description: How enabling conditions are handled by the target work.

values.name: Explicitly Acknowledged
values.use_when: the author openly names and credits the enabling condition.

values.name: Implicitly Leveraged
values.use_when: the condition is clearly used without full thematic emphasis.

values.name: Strategically Deployed
values.use_when: the condition is actively managed for argumentative effect.

values.name: Taken for Granted
values.use_when: the condition operates silently as background infrastructure.
